title: Dyonizel Modpack
description:
This is the official Modpack for the Dyonizel Minecraft server.

It contains all the mods for both clients and servers.

It is based upon the official Cobblemon Modpack (Fabric).
body:
This is the official Modpack for the Dyonizel Minecraft server.

It contains all the mods for both the client and server for extra convenience.

It is based upon [Cobblemon Modpack [Fabric] 1.6.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-fabric/version/1.6.1) but with more mods included for both the client and server.
You should check the description of the [official Cobblemon Modpack (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-fabric) for more information about the basics of the modpack.

~~You should be able to connect just fine to any vanilla Cobblemon server with this modpack as the [official Cobblemon Modpack (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-fabric).~~ By now we have too much differed from the official Cobblemon Modpack that this might not be true anymore and is not recommended.

Due to the heavy presence of server-centric mods, using this modpack for singleplayer is discouraged but should work fine.


## List of added Mods compared to [Cobblemon Modpack [Fabric] 1.6.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-fabric/version/1.6.1)
*Might not be up to date*
### For both client and server
- ~~[Cobbledex](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokedex)~~ *obsolete*
- [Cobblemon Pokenav](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokenav)
- [Cobblemon Gacha Machine](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-gacha-machine)
- [Cobblemon: Research Tasks](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-research-tasks)
- [Cobblemon: SirDoof](https://modrinth.com/mod/sirdoof)
- ~~[CobblemonRider](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonrider1.5)~~ *obsolete*
- ~~[CobbleFoods](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblefoods)~~ *outdated/obsolete*
- [CobbleStats](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-cobblestats)
- [Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding)
- [Emojiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/emojiful)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [Open Parties and Claims for Dyonizel](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims-dyonizel)
- ~~[QuickShulker](https://modrinth.com/mod/quickshulker)~~ *outdated*
- [Reinforced Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-chests)
- [Reinforced Barrels](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-barrels)
- [Reinforced Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-shulker-boxes)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- [SimpleTMs](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
- [What Are They Up To (Watut)](https://modrinth.com/mod/what-are-they-up-to)

### For client side
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Cobblemon Move Inspector](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-move-inspector)
- [CobbleThemes](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblethemes)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
- [Default Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/default-options)
- [MidnightControls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols)
- [MidnightControlsExtra](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols-extra)
- [Remote Player Waypoints for Xaero's Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/remote-player-waypoints-for-xaeros-map)

### For server side
- [Banners4BM](https://modrinth.com/mod/banners4bm)
- [BlueMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/bluemap)
- ~~[CobblePass](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobble-pass)~~ *outdated*
- [Cobblemon Challenge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon-challenge)
- [Cobblemon Counter](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-counter)
- [Cobblemon GTS](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-gts)
- [Cobblemon Hunt](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-hunt)
- [Cobblemon Unchained](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-unchained)
- ~~[CobblemonExtras](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonextras)~~ *now removed*
- [Fabric Tab List](https://modrinth.com/mod/tab)
- [GooeyLibs](https://modrinth.com/mod/gooeylibs)
- [Impactor](https://modrinth.com/mod/impactor)
- [LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/mod/luckperms)
- [Mc2Discord](https://modrinth.com/mod/mc2discord)
- [Vanish](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanish)
- [Voice Chat Interaction](https://modrinth.com/mod/voice-chat-interaction)
